skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5-120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that generates short videos from text descriptions and uploaded assets.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 534 static security detections across 13 files. All findings are legitimate API client patterns. External commands are standard shell scripting for CLI tool integration. Network access is limited to Pexo API (https://pexo.ai). Environment and file access is for configuration and asset handling. The critical heuristic warning (code execution + network + credentials) is a false positive - this is a normal API client pattern. No malicious behavior detected.

medium_findings.title: External Command Execution in Shell Scripts
medium_findings.description: The skill uses shell scripts that execute external commands (curl, jq) for API communication. This is a standard pattern for CLI tools and API clients. Commands use hardcoded arguments with no user-controlled injection.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Shell command patterns detected but these are legitimate API client operations - the scripts make authenticated HTTP calls to the Pexo API service with properly structured arguments.

medium_findings.title: Base64 Encoding Detected (Weak Crypto Flag)
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flags base64 encoding as 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. This is standard HTTP Basic Auth encoding used in API clients - not a cryptographic vulnerability.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Base64 is used for API authentication headers - a standard, secure practice. This is not a cryptographic weakness but a legitimate encoding technique.

low_findings.title: Hidden File Access for Configuration
low_findings.description: Scripts access ~/.pexo/config for reading API credentials. This is a standard configuration pattern for CLI tools - not a security risk when credentials are user-managed.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Configuration file access is for reading user-provided API credentials stored locally - standard pattern for CLI tools, not malicious behavior.

low_findings.title: Network Access to Pexo API Service
low_findings.description: Script makes HTTP requests to pexo.ai API endpoints. This is the expected behavior of an API client - no unauthorized data exfiltration detected.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network access is limited to the legitimate Pexo API service (pexo.ai) for video generation - no contact with suspicious external hosts.

content.user_title: Create AI Videos from Text Descriptions
content.value_statement: Generate professional short videos (5-120 seconds) for marketing, social media, and brand content without video editing skills.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from text descriptions in 15-20 minutes
Upload and reference images, videos, and audio as creative assets
Handle interactive workflow: ask clarifying questions, present preview options
Provide revision support - refine videos based on user feedback
limitations: Cannot access or crawl web URLs - files must be uploaded locally
Cannot generate videos longer than 120 seconds
Requires Pexo API credits for video production
May take 15-20+ minutes for complex video requests

use_cases.title: Quick Product Demo Videos
use_cases.description: Create engaging product showcase videos for e-commerce, landing pages, or social media ads by simply describing the product and its key features.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce sellers, small business owners, marketers

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Automation
use_cases.description: Generate TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content from written descriptions without video editing software or skills.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators, social media managers, influencers

use_cases.title: Brand and Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Produce professional brand videos and explainer content that communicates company messages clearly with AI-generated visuals and transitions.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams, startup founders, corporate communications

prompt_templates.title: Simple Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a product video for [product name] showing [key feature 1] and [key feature 2]. Style: [modern/cinematic/energetic]
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic video request with clear product focus

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Ad
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [15/30/60] second ad for [product/service]. Target audience: [description]. Call to action: [text]. Aspect ratio: [16:9/9:16/1:1]

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a brand video showing [company name] mission and values. Include [specific imagery/brand elements]. Tone: [professional/approachable/innovative]. Duration: [short/medium]

prompt_templates.title: Video with Reference Assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Using the uploaded image as reference, create a video that [description of desired video content]. The image shows [brief description of uploaded asset].
prompt_templates.scenario: Using uploaded images or videos as creative reference

output_examples.input: I want a 15-second product video for wireless headphones showing the noise cancellation feature and comfortable fit
output_examples.output: Video generated and delivered with download URL and project link. User receives: [1] Direct video file, [2] Full download URL with authentication parameters, [3] Project page link for revisions or downloads

output_examples.input: Make a TikTok ad for our new fitness app - energetic, 30 seconds, showing workout tracking
output_examples.output: Video created in 9:16 aspect ratio. Pexo may ask clarifying questions about target audience age range or specific workout types before final generation.

output_examples.input: Upload shoes.jpg and create a product showcase video using that image as the main visual
output_examples.output: Asset uploaded successfully. Video project created with the image as reference. Pexo agent coordinates video generation based on user request and uploaded asset.

best_practices: Be specific about video duration, aspect ratio, and tone in your request to get accurate results
For best results, describe the key message or emotion you want the video to convey
Use uploaded reference images when you have specific brand assets or product photos to incorporate
anti_patterns: Do not add creative direction that contradicts what the user requested - Pexo handles cinematography decisions
Do not wrap asset IDs in tags other than the specified format (<original-image>, <original-video>, <original-audio>)
Do not poll pexo-project-get.sh more frequently than every 60 seconds during video generation

faq.question: What video formats and lengths does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill generates videos between 5-120 seconds in three aspect ratios: 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Reels), and 1:1 (Instagram). Output is MP4 format.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Simple 15-second videos typically take 15-20 minutes. Complex videos or longer durations may take longer. The skill polls for progress and notifies you when the video is ready.

faq.question: Can I use images or videos from the internet in my requests?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot access web URLs directly. You must download files to your local system and upload them using the skill before referencing them in your video request.

faq.question: What if I want changes to the generated video?
faq.answer: You can request revisions by providing feedback. Use the same project ID to continue the conversation with Pexo about modifications.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL configured in ~/.pexo/config or as environment variables. See references/SETUP-CHECKLIST.md for setup instructions.

faq.question: What file types can I upload as assets?
faq.answer: Supported image formats: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Video formats: mp4, mov, avi. Audio formats: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.
